create-pdf-form-field-with-custom-embedd.title: Create PDF Form Field with Custom Embedded Font
create-pdf-form-field-with-custom-embedd.description: Demonstrates how to load an external TrueType font, embed it in a PDF, and apply it to a form TextBoxField's appearance using Aspose.Pdf.

set-default-appearance-for-pdf-form-fiel.title: Set Default Appearance for PDF Form Fields
set-default-appearance-for-pdf-form-fiel.description: Demonstrates how to define a default font, size, and color for all form fields in a PDF by assigning a DefaultAppearance to the document's Form.

apply-background-image-to-pdf-form-field.title: Set Background Image for PDF Form Field
apply-background-image-to-pdf-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to apply an image as the background of a PDF form field (handling both XFA and AcroForm fields) using Aspose.Pdf and then save the updated document.

add-submit-button-with-url-action.title: Add Submit Button with URL Action to PDF
add-submit-button-with-url-action.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically add a push‑button to a PDF and configure its OnActivated action to submit the form to a specified URL using Aspose.Pdf.

export-form-field-appearance-streams.title: Export Form Field Appearance Streams to Separate PDFs
export-form-field-appearance-streams.description: Shows how to extract each form field's appearance stream from a PDF and save it as an individual PDF file for visual inspection.

assign-image-to-pdf-button-field.title: Assign Image to PDF Button Field
assign-image-to-pdf-button-field.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, locating a button form field, and setting a custom appearance stream using an external image file, then saving the branded PDF.

create-pdf-form-template-from-json.title: Create PDF Form Template and Populate from JSON
create-pdf-form-template-from-json.description: Shows how to programmatically build a PDF form with placeholder fields using Aspose.Pdf, generate a sample JSON data file, and fill the form by importing the JSON values.

create-pdf-form-with-qr-code.title: Create PDF Form with QR Code Field
create-pdf-form-with-qr-code.description: Shows how to build a PDF form that contains a user‑editable text box and a QR code field that reflects the entered data using Aspose.Pdf.

auto-update-qr-code-from-text-field.title: Auto‑Update QR Code from Text Field in PDF
auto-update-qr-code-from-text-field.description: Demonstrates how to create a text box and a QR code barcode field in a PDF and use JavaScript to automatically update the QR code whenever the text field value changes.

add-progress-bar-field-to-pdf-form.title: Add Progress Bar Field to PDF Form
add-progress-bar-field-to-pdf-form.description: Shows how to insert a read‑only TextBoxField that serves as a visual progress bar in an existing PDF form and optionally add a custom appearance using Aspose.Pdf.

language-specific-pdf-form-dynamic-label.title: Language‑Specific PDF Form with Dynamic Label
language-specific-pdf-form-dynamic-label.description: Shows how to create a PDF form that changes a label's text based on the selected locale using a combo box and JavaScript actions.
